description: Inspect every hull type, station, and race-specific texture across the sector.

briefing.text: Commander, Arsenal Station displays the full fleet and station roster for all eight races. Each sector grid showcases race-specific hull textures tinted by faction color — pan across the map to compare Terran, Vesper, Korath, and the other design languages. No combat required.
objectivesPreview: Inspect all 19 hull types per race in the sector grids
Compare all 10 station types with race textures and player tints
Pan the map to visit each of the eight race zones

primary.description: Inspect the fleet gallery for 45 seconds
